# NPC Template

## Format

```
**[Name]** - [Role/Function]

Drive: [what they want]
Weakness: [how to defeat/persuade]
Moves: [1-2 GM moves]
```

## Placeholders

| Placeholder | Description | Example |
|-------------|-------------|---------|
| `[Name]` | NPC name or title | "Dremmer the Fixer" |
| `[Role/Function]` | Purpose in story | "Information broker" |
| `[Drive]` | Motivation | "Accumulate leverage over everyone" |
| `[Weakness]` | Exploitable flaw | "Trusts family too much" |
| `[Moves]` | GM actions | "Offer a deal with strings attached" |

## Customization Notes

Adapt this template based on the game system:
- For combat-focused systems: add `Threat:` level and `HP/Harm:`
- For social systems: add `Leverage:` and `Bonds:`
- For mystery systems: add `Secrets:` and `Clues:`
- For faction systems: add `Allegiance:` and `Resources:`
